nodes.label: Token-Saving Delegation Rationale
nodes.rationale: Compressed subagent output preserves more main-thread context across repeated delegations.

nodes.label: Token Reduction Rationale
nodes.rationale: Dropping filler, articles, pleasantries, and hedging reduces output tokens while preserving technical substance.

nodes.label: Why Over What Rationale
nodes.rationale: Commit bodies should explain non-obvious why because the diff already shows what changed.
